title: Cornelius Police Target Illegal Electric Motorcycles
summary: Cornelius police are cracking down on illegal electric motorcycles ridden by teens, citing safety risks and potential fines.

title: Pedestrian Fatality Reported in Hickory
summary: A pedestrian was fatally struck in Hickory on Wednesday evening, according to police reports.

title: County Authority to Shut Down Factories Examined
summary: York County can shut down factories for zoning or safety violations, but needs state intervention for environmental issues.
